alfred_grimhands_barcrawl:
{{External|rs=Bar Crawl (miniquest)|rsc=Alfred Grimhand Bar Crawl}}
{{Has quick guide|mini=1}}
{{Infobox Miniquest
|name = 
|image = [[File:Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl.png|300px]]
|release = [[25 March]] [[2002]]
|update = Latest RuneScape News (25 March 2002)
|members = Yes
|series = None
|developer = Andrew Gower
}}
'''Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl''' is a [[miniquest]] that is required to be completed in order to gain access to the [[Horror from the Deep]] and [[Scorpion Catcher]] [[quests]], and access to the [[Barbarian Outpost Agility Course]], where it is considered a "rite of passage". To complete it, you must trek around various [[Bar (location)|bars and pubs]] in ''Old School RuneScape'', drinking a specialty drink, having them sign off a supplied [[Barcrawl card]]. The miniquest is notable for granting the ability to automatically smash [[vial]]s on drinking the last dose of a potion.

==Details==
{{Quest details
|start = Speak to the [[barbarian guard]] at the entrance of the Barbarian Agility Training Course.
|startmap = 2544,3569
|difficulty = 1
|length = Medium
|description = Go to bars and buy alcohol.
|requirements = None
|items = *208 [[coins]] to buy all the required alcohol
|recommended = *[[Restore potion]]s to restore skills that are lowered
*[[Food]] to recover any lost hitpoints
*[[Stamina potion|Stamina]] or [[energy potion]]s
*Fast travel to several locations
**Barbarian Outpost ([[Games Necklace]])
**Varrock ([[Varrock teleport]], [[Chronicle]] or [[Combat Bracelet]] to the Champions' Guild)
**Lumberyard ([[Lumberyard teleport]], [[Digsite pendant]] or [[Digsite teleport]])
**Tree Gnome Stronghold ([[Balloon Transport System]], [[Gnome Glider]], [[Spirit Tree]] or [[Slayer Ring]] to the Slayer Cave)
**Brimhaven ([[Brimhaven teleport]], [[Teleport to House]] if your house is in Brimhaven, or ship from [[Ardougne]])
**Musa Point ([[Amulet of Glory]] to Karamja or ship from [[Port Sarim]])
**Port Sarim ([[Explorer's Ring 2]], [[Amulet of Glory]] to Draynor Village or [[Rat Pits]] [[minigame]] teleport)
**Yanille ([[Watchtower teleport]] or [[Nightmare Zone]] [[minigame]] teleport)
**Ardougne ([[Ardougne teleport]] or [[Ardougne cloak]])
**Falador ([[Falador teleport]])
**Seers' Village ([[Camelot teleport]] or [[Combat Bracelet]] to the Ranging Guild)
|leagueRegion = <poem>
{{RE|Kandarin}} - location requirement 
Unlocking {{RE|Kandarin}} will auto-complete the bar visits in {{RE|Asgarnia}}
Unlocking {{RE|Fremennik}} {{okay}} will auto-complete the miniquest
</poem>
}}

==Walkthrough==
===Starting out===
To begin, talk to one of the barbarian guards outside the [[Agility]] training area at the [[Barbarian Outpost]] (Games necklace) to get the [[Barcrawl card]]. If your inventory is full, the guard will make no mention of the miniquest and you '''will not receive the card'''. While doing the bar crawl, you'll be given a card with a list of all the bars you have to visit. Each one will be checked off when you've found it and drunk the specific brew required. If you lose the card, you'll have to start the entire miniquest all over again.

You'll need to tell the barkeepers that you're doing the Alfred Grimhand Barcrawl and they will give you what you need. The brews are very strong, though, causing some damage as well as some steep temporary drops in stats. The entire trip will cost around 230 coins, plus money for [[runes]]/[[teleport tablet|tablets]] and boat trips to [[Karamja]]. Once you have every line of the card signed, return it to one of the guards at the Barbarian Outpost.

===Visiting the bars===
You can visit the bars in any order. The amount of damage dealt by the damaging drinks is dependent on your [[Hitpoints]] level. For the possible routes, check out the section after the table below. Note that a very cost efficient way to get around is by going on to a house party world (World 330 for example) to use the teleports and the [[jewellery box]]es provided by the hosts.

===Possible routes===
{{Checklist|
*The [[Forester's Arms]] - Teleport to Camelot and head west to [[Seers' Village]].
*The [[Blurberry Bar]] -  If [[Tree Gnome Village]] has been completed, teleport to Grand Exchange and use the [[spirit tree]] to teleport directly to the [[Tree Gnome Stronghold]]. Alternatively, the [[Amulet of glory]] or the [[Ring of dueling#Teleportation_options|Al Kharid PvP Arena teleport]] can be used to teleport to [[Al Kharid]] and then a [[gnome glider]] can be used to get to the [[Tree Gnome Stronghold]] after completing [[The Grand Tree]] quest. It's also possible to use a [[Grand seed pod]] - note that this is not recommended due to the price of the pod. Alternatively, you can use a [[Skills Necklace|Fishing guild teleport]] and run West. After reaching the Tree Gnome Stronghold, go to the {{FloorNumber|uk=1}} of the [[Grand Tree]], and get the drink from [[Blurberry]] at the [[Blurberry Bar]].
*The [[Jolly Boar Inn]] - A [[Lumberyard teleport]] is the quickest way. If the [[gnome glider]]s can be used, you can take the glider to Varrock and walk north-west. Alternatively, you can use a [[Digsite Pendant]] or [[Digsite Teleport]] and walk north-west. You can also teleport to Varrock, head east outside of the city, and then straight north to the bar. If using the spirit trees, teleport back to the Grand Exchange and either use the north-west agility [[shortcut]] (21 Agility required) and run east along the [[Wilderness]] border. With {{SCP|Firemaking|50}} and access to the [[Balloon transport system]], you could alternatively teleport to [[Castle Wars]] and pay [[Willow logs]] to get to the Lumber Yard.
*The [[Blue Moon Inn]] - Use a [[Varrock teleport]], the [[Chronicle]] or walk back to the southern end of Varrock.
*The [[Flying Horse Inn]] -  The [[Rat Pits]] of [[Ardougne]] (run by [[Jimmy Dazzler]]) are next to the pub - if possible, you can teleport using the minigame teleport. Alternatively, use a [[Skills Necklace]] to teleport to the Fishing Guild, Teleport to [[Ardougne]], take [[Captain Barnaby]]'s boat from [[Rimmington]] or use the spirit tree in the Gnome Stronghold to teleport to the [[Khazard battlefield]], and then proceed to the north-western part of East Ardougne.
* The [[Dragon Inn]] - Use a [[Watchtower Teleport]], [[Teleport to House|teleport to house]] in Yanille, teleport to Castle Wars, use fairy ring code {{fairycode|ciq}}, or the minigame teleport to the Nightmare Zone and walk south-west from there to [[Yanille]]. The bar is at the south-western part of the city.
*The [[Rising Sun Inn]] - Teleport to Falador. The bar is south-west of the teleport spot.
*[[The Rusty Anchor]] - Use an [[Explorer's ring 2]] or higher variant to teleport to the Falador farm cabbage patch and run south to The Rusty Anchor, use an [[amulet of glory]] to teleport to [[Draynor Village]] and walk west to Port Sarim, use the [[Rat Pits]] minigame teleport to get to [[Port Sarim]], use the [[Pest Control]] [[minigame teleport]] and run north and travel with the squire to get to Port Sarim, if your [[POH|house]] is in [[Rimmington]], teleport to house and run east to [[Port Sarim]], or simply walk south from Falador to Port Sarim and proceed to the most north-eastern building in Port Sarim.
*The [[Karamja Wines, Spirits, and Beers|Karamja Spirits Bar]]  -  Take a ship to [[Musa Point]] from Port Sarim or glory teleport to Karamja.
*[[Dead Man's Chest]] - Take a [[charter ship]] to [[Brimhaven]], or take [[Captain Barnaby]]'s boat from [[Rimmington]], or go to Musa Point and walk past the volcano.
*Return to the [[Barbarian Outpost]], preferably by using a games necklace.
}}

====Alternative routes====
=====Low magic/few teleports=====
{{Checklist|
*Run to the [[Tree Gnome Stronghold]], go to the {{FloorNumber|uk=1}} of the [[Grand Tree]], and get the drink from [[Blurberry Bar]].
*Go to Ardougne, then proceed to the [[Flying Horse Inn]], located in the western side of East Ardougne.
*Travel south to [[Yanille]]. Buy a drink from the bar at the south-western part of the city.
*Go to Varrock and visit the [[Blue Moon Inn]].
*Proceed north-east in Varrock to the [[Jolly Boar Inn]]. It is just west of the [[Lumber Yard]].
*Go to Falador and then go to the [[Rising Sun Inn]].
*Walk to [[Port Sarim]], and proceed to [[the Rusty Anchor]].
*Take the ship to [[Musa Point]] and visit the [[Karamja Wines, Spirits, and Beers|Karamja Spirits Bar]].
*Take the [[charter ship]] to [[Brimhaven]], or simply run west over the volcano, getting the drink from the [[Dead Man's Chest]].
*Now take the charter ship for 480 coins to Catherby then go to [[Seers' Village]], and then visit the [[Forester's Arms]].
*Return to the [[Barbarian Outpost]], preferably by using a games necklace.
}}

=====Low cost/low magic/shortest walking distances=====
Required:
*Extra coins for transportation
*A [[games necklace]]
*A [[Dramen staff]] or better for Fairy Ring teleportation
*Unlocked [[Balloon transport system]] to [[Falador]] and [[Varrock]]

{{Checklist|
* Start in [[Seers' Village]] (walk or teleport there), and visit the [[Forester's Arms]].
* Take the Sinclair Mansion fairy ring to [[Yanille]] ({{fairycode|ciq}}). Buy a drink from the bar at the south-western part of the city.
* Run back to the fairy ring, travel to the Grand Exchange ({{fairycode|dkr}}) and climb the [[Spirit Tree]] to the [[Tree Gnome Stronghold]], go to the {{FloorNumber|uk=1}} of the [[Grand Tree]], and get the drink from [[BlurberryBar]].
* Climb the Spirit Tree again to the [[Khazard Battlefield]] and run north to the [[Flying Horse Inn]], located in the western side of East Ardougne.
* Take the ship to [[Brimhaven]], getting the drink from the [[Dead Man's Chest]].
* Walk to [[Musa Point]] and visit the [[Karamja Wines, Spirits, and Beers|Karamja Spirits Bar]].
* Take the ship to [[Port Sarim]], and proceed to [[the Rusty Anchor]].
* Run north (or teleport) to Falador and then go to the [[Rising Sun Inn]]. This is probably the longest distance to run after Seers' Village, you can consider to teleport.
* Run south (by first taking the Crumbling Wall on the West, or going underneath in the south) and take the [[balloon transport system|balloon]] to [[Varrock]] and walk to the [[Jolly Boar Inn]].
* Run south and visit the [[Blue Moon Inn]].
* Return to the [[Barbarian Outpost]], preferably by using a [[games necklace]].
}}

=====Utilising gnomes' transportation=====
Required:
*Extra coins for transportation
*Access to [[spirit tree]]s and [[gnome glider]]s
*Easy access to a [[spirit tree]] (e.g. [[Ardougne cloak]])

{{Checklist|
* Start in the [[Tree Gnome Stronghold]] and go to the {{FloorNumber|uk=1}} of the [[Grand Tree]] to get the drink from [[BlurberryBar]].
* Take the [[gnome glider]] to [[Lemanto Andra]] and walk north-west to the [[Jolly Boar Inn]].
* Walk around to the [[Blue Moon Inn]] in South [[Varrock]].
* Take the spirit tree from the [[Grand Exchange]] to [[Khazard Battlefield]] to the [[Flying Horse Inn]].
* Take the [[charter ship]] to [[Brimhaven]] and get wasted at the [[Dead Man's Chest]].
* Run east to the [[Karamja Wines, Spirits, and Beers|Karamja Spirits Bar]] at [[Musa Point]].
** If you haven't done [[Pirate's Treasure]] yet, now's a good time to smuggle your [[Karamjan rum]] over.
* Take the ship to [[Port Sarim]] and go north to the [[Rusty Anchor Inn]].
* From then, go north into [[Falador]] and visit the [[Rising Sun Inn]].
* Take a spirit tree to [[Tree Gnome Village (location)|Tree Gnome Village]] and leave the maze via [[Elkoy]]. Run south and then east to get to [[Yanille]]'s [[Dragon Inn]].
** Players who have access to the [[Nightmare Zone]] can use the minigame teleport instead, and also pop in and out of a practice instance to restore run energy.
* Take the charter ship from [[Port Khazard]], a little north east of Yanille, to [[Catherby]], and run to [[Seers' Village]] to visit the [[Forester's Arms]].
* Return to the [[Barbarian Outpost]], either by running west, using a [[Games Necklace]], or taking the minigame teleport to [[Barbarian Assault]].
}}

==Rewards==
Upon completion of the miniquest, players will now be able to access the [[Barbarian Outpost Agility Course]], which is required to enter during [[Scorpion Catcher]] and [[Horror from the Deep]]. In addition, players can speak to the [[barbarian guard]] to learn how to automatically smash empty vials upon drinking the last dose of a potion. After doing so, this feature can be toggled in the [[settings]] menu under "Automatically smash empty vials."

==Required for completing==
Completion of Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl is required for the following:
* [[Horror from the Deep]]
* [[Medium Kandarin Diary]]
* [[Scorpion Catcher]]

==Transcript==
{{hastranscript|Quest}}

==Trivia==
*After completing all bar crawl locations, you will be unable to read the bar crawl card as you will be "too drunk."
*After drinking in Brimhaven, it says you think you see two bartenders signing two barcrawl cards.
*After drinking at the Falador pub, your screen will sway slightly to indicate you are drunk.
*None of the drinks appear in a player's inventory but are drunk automatically.
*After you hand the bar crawl card to the guard, he says that he never learned to read, he just sees you are plenty drunk and lets you go to the agility course.
*It is possible to redo the miniquest by drop-tricking to make a duplicate and, before completing the quest, dropping it again. To start it again, the player must go to one of the bars; however, they will be unable to enter the agility course until they complete it again.
*Alfred Grimhand makes an appearance as a [[barbarian bartender]] in the [[2022 Christmas event]]. Alfred was the first to successfully accomplish this barcrawl,{{CiteNPC|npc=Barbarian guard|loc=Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl|quote=The Alfred Grimhand Barcrawl! First completed by Alfred Grimhand.}} though he tells players that it was originally a prank for new recruits.{{CiteNPC|npc=Barbarian bartender|loc=2022 Christmas event|quote=Originally it [the barcrawl] was a funny prank back in the day for new recruits.}}

==References==
{{Reflist}}

{{Alfred Grimhand's Barcrawl}}
{{Miniquests}}
animal_magnetism:
{{External|rs}}
{{Has quick guide}}
{{Infobox Quest
|name = Animal Magnetism
|number = 116
|image = [[File:Animal Magnetism.png|300px]]
|release = [[12 December]] [[2006]]
|update = Animal Magnetism
|members = Yes
|series = None
|developer = Matt H
}}
'''Animal Magnetism''' is a quest in which the player helps [[Ava]], a scientist living in [[Draynor Manor]]. Completion of the quest rewards access to [[Ava's device]]s, robust ranged cape slot equipment that attract a percentage of ammunition fired during [[Ranged]] combat.

==Details==
{{Quest details
|start = Speak to [[Ava]] in [[Draynor Manor]].
|startmap = 3093,3358
|difficulty = Intermediate
|description = Draynor Manor has a new resident and, adventurers rejoice, she is a damsel in distress. Far from being Sleeping Beauty, she finds the Manor's beds not to her liking and is suffering from insomniac nights. If you fancy yourself able to aid Ava in her search for a good night's sleep, who knows what the budding scientist will produce as a reward?
|length = Medium
|requirements = *Completion of the following quests:
**[[The Restless Ghost]]
**[[Ernest the Chicken]]
**[[Priest in Peril]]
*{{SCP|Slayer|18|link=yes}} {{Boostable|no}} {{Questreqstart|yes}}
*{{SCP|Crafting|19|link=yes}} {{Boostable|no}} {{Questreqstart|yes}}
*{{SCP|Ranged|30|link=yes}} {{Boostable|no}} {{Questreqstart|yes}}
*{{SCP|Woodcutting|35|link=yes}} {{Boostable|no}} {{Questreqstart|yes}}
|items = *[[Mithril axe]] (required to obtain the [[blessed axe]]; no other type of axe will do)
*5 [[iron bar]]s
*[[Ghostspeak amulet]] ([[Morytania legs]] will not work)
*20 [[ecto-token]]s (or 4 [[bones]], 4 [[bucket]]s and 4 [[pot]]s to gain the tokens)
*[[Hammer]]
*[[Hard leather]]
*[[Holy symbol]]
*[[Polished buttons]]
|recommended = *10 more [[ecto-token]]s to purchase an [[Undead chicken (item)|undead chicken]] that you can keep
*[[Stamina potion|Stamina]] or [[energy potion]]
*Fast travel to several locations
**Draynor Manor ([[Draynor Manor Teleport]] or [[amulet of glory]] to Draynor Village)
**Port Phasmatys ([[Ectophial]], [[charter ship]]s or [[fairy ring]] code {{fairycode|alq}})
**Slayer Tower ([[Slayer ring]], [[Fenkenstrain's Castle Teleport]], [[Kharyrll Teleport]], [[Salve Graveyard Teleport]] or [[fairy ring]] code {{fairycode|cks}})
**Burthorpe ([[Games necklace]], [[Burthorpe Games Room]] [[grouping]] teleport, [[combat bracelet]] to the Warriors' Guild, [[Taverley teleport]] or [[Teleport to House]] if it is in Taverley)
**Rimmington ([[Rimmington teleport]], [[Teleport to House]] if it is in Rimmington, [[skills necklace]] to the Crafting Guild or [[Rat Pits]] [[grouping]] teleport)
|ironman = *[[Mithril axe]] ({{SCP|Smithing|51|link=yes}} {{Boostable|yes}}); {{SCP|Thieving|28|link=yes}} {{Boostable|yes}} for the [[Chest (Isle of Souls Dungeon)|Isle of Souls dungeon chest]]; {{SCP|Woodcutting|60|link=yes}} {{Boostable|yes}} to purchase axe from [[Perry's Chop-chop Shop]] in the [[Woodcutting Guild]]; access to [[fairy rings]] ({{Fairycode|BKQ}}) and killing [[tree spirit]]s, blue dragons, or king sand crabs)
* [[Holy symbol]] ({{SCP|Prayer|31|link=yes}} {{Boostable|no}})
|leagueRegion = <poem>
{{RE|Asgarnia}} — location requirement
{{RE|Morytania}} — location requirement
Unlocking {{RE|Fremennik}} {{okay}} will auto-complete the quest
</poem>
}}

==Walkthrough==
{{Map|x=3093|y=3357|r=3|mtype=square|caption=The quest's start point.|align=right|width=250|height=150|zoom=2|group=Ava}}
[[File:Ava chathead.png|left]]
To start the quest, talk to [[Ava]] on the ground floor in the west wing of [[Draynor Manor]]. You'll have to search a [[Bookcase (Draynor Manor)|bookcase]] to open a secret door to get to her.

You will find out she is the new assistant of [[Professor Oddenstein|the professor]] at the top floor of the manor. She tells you she will make you something if you can get her some things to fix her bed. She will ask you for two [[undead chicken]]s.

===Undead chickens===
{{Map|name=Old crone|x=3465|y=3560|3460,3556|3467,3556|3467, 3561|3460,3561|r=4|mtype=polygon|align=right|caption=The location of the old crone's house.|width=180|height=180|zoom=1|group=Crone}}
{{Needed|A [[ghostspeak amulet]] and 20 [[ecto-tokens]] (or 4 [[bones]], 4 [[empty pots]], and 4 [[empty buckets]] to obtain the ecto-tokens during the quest)|recommended=}}
Travel to the [[undead chicken]] farm west of the [[Ectofuntus]] with your [[ghostspeak amulet]] and [[ecto-tokens]], and talk to [[Alice]]. If you do not have enough ecto-tokens, see the [[Ectofuntus]] page on how to make them. The simplest way to reach Alice is using an [[ectophial]] (after completing [[Ghosts Ahoy]]). The farm is also just north of fairy ring {{Fairycode|ALQ}}.

After finishing the conversation with Alice, talk to her husband's ghost, [[Malcolm]], who roams the farm near the [[undead cow]]s. Go back and forth between Alice and her husband until Malcolm asks you to speak with her directly. In order to make that happen, you must travel to the [[Old Crone]] and have her make a modified ghostspeak amulet for Malcolm. The Old Crone resides east of the [[Slayer Tower]]. Speak to her while still wearing the ghostspeak amulet, and she will give you a [[crone-made amulet]]. You will make a remark about [[Ghosts Ahoy]] if you have completed that quest.

[[File:Animal Magnetism - Bessie killed.png|thumb|Cow31337Killer appears and kills Bessie!]]
Deliver the amulet to the husband at the farm, and talk to him again. An amusing cutscene will play, involving a fake player character named [[Cow31337Killer]]. Malcolm will then finally offer to sell you undead chickens (for 10 [[ecto-tokens]] each). Purchase two of them.

To collect ecto-tokens, run east to the [[Ectofuntus]]. Fill at least 4 empty [[bucket]]s with slime by going down the trapdoor to the west of the Ectofuntus and continuing down to the slime pit. Crush at least 2 bones into empty [[pot]]s for [[bonemeal]] with the [[bone grinder]] on the {{FloorNumber|uk=1}}, directly above the Ectofuntus. Worship the Ectofuntus in the middle of the {{FloorNumber|uk=0}}, and collect the ecto-tokens by speaking to a [[ghost disciple]] with a [[amulet of ghostspeak]] or [[Morytania Legs 2]] equipped.
{{Listen
|title = Chicken cutscene
|align = left
|filename = Chicken cutscene (Animal Magnetism).ogg
|desc = The music track that only plays during the quest's cutscene.}}{{Clear|left}}

===Magnet===
{{Needed|5 [[iron bars]], a [[hammer]], and your two [[undead chicken]]s.|recommended=Quick-travel to Rimmington, such as a House Teleport.}}
Return to [[Ava]] and hand her the [[Undead chicken (item)|undead chickens]]. Wielding one of them during the conversation will lead to some humorous dialogue. Ava will now request a [[bar magnet|magnet]].

[[File:Animal Magnetism - Creating bar magnet.gif|thumb|upright=0.7|Creating the bar magnet.]]
Speak with the [[witch]] in a room nearby. She will give you a [[selected iron]] for 5 iron bars and instructions on how to turn the iron into a magnet. Travel to the centre of the mine north-east of [[Rimmington]] and use a hammer on the iron while facing north. This will turn it into a [[bar magnet]].

===Undead twigs===
{{Needed|[[Mithril axe]] and a [[holy symbol]].|recommended=Games necklace to teleport to Burthorpe.}}
Head back to [[Ava]] with the magnet. You will be granted 50 [[Crafting]] experience when you give Ava the magnet. She will tell you she needs [[undead twigs]] from one of the [[undead tree]]s around the [[Draynor Manor|manor]]. Attempt to cut one of these trees, and you will find it cannot be done with a regular axe. Return to Ava to ask her for a solution, and she will refer you to [[Turael]] in [[Burthorpe]], who has apparently been using his [[Slayer]] skills to figure out a way to defeat the undead trees.

[[File:Animal Magnetism - Cutting the Undead Tree.png|thumb|Cutting the undead tree.]]
Talk to Turael. Make sure you don't accidentally request an unwanted [[Slayer task]] from him. Turael will grant you a [[blessed axe]] in exchange for a [[mithril axe]] and a [[holy symbol]]. He will not accept another type of axe. With the blessed axe, return to [[Draynor Manor]] and chop an undead tree until you receive some [[undead twigs]].

===Translating the notes===
{{Needed|[[Hard leather]] and [[polished buttons]].|recommended=}}
[[File:Translated notes interface.png|thumb|right|The notes translated.]]
Deliver the twigs to Ava. She will tell you she has almost completed her invention, but some of the [[Research notes (Animal Magnetism)|research notes]] she has gathered still need to be translated. You can translate these notes by selecting the correct buttons that appear on screen. ''You can use the picture for the solution.''

Once you have ungarbled the notes, talk to [[Ava]], and she will tell you the last items she needs to finish the device: some [[hard leather]] and [[polished buttons]]. Combine these two items with the [[A pattern|pattern]] given to you to create [[a container]]. Hand the container over to Ava to complete the quest.

'''Congratulations! Quest completed!'''

==Rewards==
{{Quest rewards
|name = Animal Magnetism
|image = [[File:Animal Magnetism reward scroll.png|centre]]
|qp = 1
|rewards = 
*{{SCP|Crafting|1,000|link=yes}} experience
*{{SCP|Fletching|1,000|link=yes}} experience
*{{SCP|Slayer|1,000|link=yes}} experience
*{{SCP|Woodcutting|2,500|link=yes}} experience
*[[Ava's attractor]] if your [[Ranged]] level is less than 50, or [[Ava's accumulator]] if your Ranged level is 50 or higher
*The ability to trade with [[Ava]] and purchase her [[Ava's device|devices]]
}}

==Required for completing==
Completion of Animal Magnetism is required for the following:
*[[Dragon Slayer II]]
*[[Lumbridge & Draynor Medium Diary]]

==Trivia==
*The quest's name is a reference to [[wiktionary:animal magnetism|a phrase of the same name]], referring to either sexual attractiveness or a hypothesised natural force in all living beings.

{{Animal Magnetism}}
